meta.title: Min Thep — Software Engineer & Creative Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Min Thep (Mai Tan Thep) — Software Engineer & Creative Developer from Vietnam. Minthep: IT craft and Japanese study in one place.

paragraphs: Hi, I'm Mai Tan Thep (Min Thep) — a Software Engineer & Creative Developer based in Vietnam.
Software Engineering at FPT University (2022–2025). I build web products that stay fast and readable: portfolios that travel, platforms for real users, and experiments on GitHub.
Minthep is my study web: IT depth on one side, Japanese on the other — vocabulary, reading, and the same discipline I use when shipping code. Reach me at maitanthepmrthep@gmail.com for collaboration.

skills.headline: Stack built in coursework and shipped repos — same calendar as Japanese study.
skills.aside: Mai Tan Thep · FPT Software Engineering (2022–2025). Listed tools match real GitHub work, not filler keywords.

clusters.label: Languages
clusters.description: Typed JS where it pays off, semantic HTML, and CSS that stays legible when layouts change.

clusters.label: Frameworks
clusters.description: React-first interfaces, Node for services and APIs, Tailwind for speed, Three.js when the brief needs depth.

clusters.label: Tools
clusters.description: Design handoff in Figma, persistence with MongoDB and Firebase, ship with Docker, GitHub, and Vercel.

japanese.title: Parallel track with engineering
japanese.body: Vocabulary lists, kanji reps, and reading blocks sit on the same weekly grid as coursework and shipping.
japanese.note: Same boring consistency: grammar patterns and pull requests both need daily reps.

items.name: Minthep Portfolio
items.shortDescription: Study web: IT craft and Japanese, in one site
items.longDescription: Personal portfolio and study surface — shader hero, editorial layout, capabilities bento, and project list. Built as a place to show engineering work alongside Japanese study discipline. Earned 93+ stars on GitHub.

items.name: GenKiKoi Fish Care
items.longDescription: A full-stack veterinary management platform for Koi fish care, featuring appointment scheduling, health records, and treatment tracking.

items.name: Wedding Bolt
items.longDescription: Beautiful digital wedding invitation platform with customizable templates, RSVP functionality, and elegant animations for the special day.

items.name: Korean Magic Page
items.longDescription: An interactive platform for learning Korean with gamified exercises, vocabulary practice, and progress tracking features.

items.name: Grok AI Chat
items.shortDescription: AI ChatBot with GenZ Vietnamese version
items.longDescription: An AI chatbot interface inspired by Grok, featuring a fun GenZ Vietnamese language mode with slang responses and cultural references.

items.name: VuVu Store
items.longDescription: A vibrant e-commerce platform inspired by Popmart, featuring collectible toy browsing, cart management, and a sleek shopping experience.

items.name: Bầu Cua Tết
items.shortDescription: Traditional Vietnamese dice game for Tết
items.longDescription: A digital recreation of the beloved Vietnamese Lunar New Year dice game, with festive Tết-themed visuals and animations.

items.name: Free Map Routing
items.longDescription: An alternative routing solution for Vietnam where Google Maps API is restricted, using open-source map services for navigation.

contact.headline: If the project needs both taste and technical care, we should talk.
